title: Implement core POS Backend APIs for products and sales
description: Develop FastAPI backend APIs for managing products (CRUD), handling cart operations (add, remove, update quantity), and processing sales transactions. Use PostgreSQL for data storage and Pydantic for validation.
acceptance_criteria: API endpoints for product CRUD operations are functional.
API endpoints for adding items to cart, updating quantities, and removing items are functional.
API endpoint for processing a sale (checkout) is functional and records the transaction.
Data is persisted correctly in PostgreSQL.
Input data is validated using Pydantic models.

title: Develop Web UI for product display, cart, and checkout
description: Build a React TypeScript web application that displays products, allows users to add/remove items to a cart, update quantities, and complete the checkout process by interacting with the backend APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Products are displayed clearly with relevant information.
Users can add products to a cart, view cart contents, and adjust quantities.
The checkout flow is intuitive and allows for completing a sale.
Frontend successfully integrates and communicates with the backend APIs.

title: Set up automated testing and Dockerized deployment
description: Configure automated unit and integration tests for both backend (Pytest) and frontend (Jest). Create Dockerfiles and a Docker Compose setup to containerize the application services for local development and deployment.
acceptance_criteria: Backend unit tests are implemented and pass with good coverage.
Frontend unit tests are implemented and pass.
Dockerfiles exist for both backend and frontend services.
docker-compose up successfully builds and runs all services.
Basic integration tests verify communication between frontend and backend.

title: Develop Mobile UI for product display and cart
description: Build a React Native mobile application (using Expo) that displays products and allows users to add/remove items to a cart, update quantities, and view cart contents, integrating with the backend APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Products are displayed correctly on mobile devices.
Users can interact with the cart on mobile.
Mobile app successfully integrates with the backend APIs.
Basic navigation between product list and cart is functional.
